data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: All data transmissions are secured using up-to-date SSL/TLS encryption standards.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 is enabled across all domains to encrypt data in transit.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements multiple layers of protection to mitigate Distributed Denial-of-Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Employing advanced traffic filtering, rate limiting, and real-time monitoring.

data.title: Firewall Systems
data.description: Robust firewalls are in place to prevent unauthorized access to the backend systems.
data.technical_spec: Advanced firewall rules and intrusion detection systems are configured.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Multi-factor authentication is used to enhance user login security.
data.technical_spec: Combination of biometrics, OTPs, and password policies.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Continuous security auditing and vulnerability assessment processes are in place.
data.technical_spec: Automated scanning combined with manual penetration testing.
